user.title: GoodWe Local SEMS Bridge
user.description: Enter the IP address of your GoodWe inverter. The inverter will be contacted to verify the connection and read its device information.

confirm.title: Confirm Inverter
confirm.description:
Found inverter **{model}** (S/N: {serial}) at {host}.

Confirm to complete setup. The integration will connect directly to your inverter and relay its data to the SEMS portal every 60 seconds.

abort.cannot_read_header: Connected to the inverter but could not read device data. Try again.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to SEMS portal. Check your network connection.
error.cannot_fetch_stations: Authenticated successfully but failed to retrieve power stations.
error.no_stations: No power stations found on this SEMS account.
error.cannot_fetch_inverters: Failed to retrieve inverters for the selected station.
error.no_inverters: No inverters found for the selected power station.
